utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check if each is present and fully detailed in the final package. 1) destination: Lisbon, Portugal – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: start and end dates given – fully specified. 3) transportation: flight details with costs and airline included – fully specified. 4) accommodation: hotel details with cost breakdown – fully specified. 5) activities: specified with description, duration, cost – fully specified. 6) additional_services: travel insurance listed but missing cost – not fully specified. 7) total_budget: cost breakdown and total included – fully specified. Thus, 6 out of 7 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package lists Lisbon, Portugal as the destination, which corresponds to a rating of 10 in the ground-truth data. The transportation is a Budget Airline in Economy Class, which is rated 10. The accommodation is Cityscape Hotel, rated 8. The activity listed is 'Rock Climbing & Scuba Diving Adventure', which combines Rock Climbing (rating 10) and Scuba Diving Excursion (rating 10); since both have the same rating, we list them separately. The only additional service explicitly mentioned is travel insurance, which is not rated in the ground-truth data and thus not included in the RATINGS mapping.
